messages.content: A giant box shifted 5 units up higher in the air away from everything.
A standard cylinder flipped completely backwards and upside down at the origin.
[standard cylinder][0,0,0,-90,0,0,1.0]
A capsule way off to the right 10 units away in world space.
A tiny miniature sphere facing sideways looking right.
[miniature sphere][0,0,0,0,90,0,0.2]
A rough spiky mesh primitive toppled over face down at world center.
An elongated torus tilted and slanted at a forty five degree angle.
A flat squashed crescent base facing away in the opposite direction.
A slender skinny cone projecting far ahead along the forward vector.
An elephant standing directly on top of a red balloon.
[red balloon][0,0,0,0,0,0,0.3][large elephant][0,0,fh,0,0,0,3.0]
A red balloon squeezed directly underneath an elephant's foot.
An elephant standing on top of a red balloon, shifted half its depth forward so the front of the elephant is centered halfway over the balloon.
[red balloon][0,0,0,0,0,0,0.3][large elephant][0,hd,fh,0,0,0,3.0]
A red balloon tucked directly underneath an elephant, shifted half its depth backward.
[large elephant][0,0,0,0,0,0,3.0][red balloon][0,-hd,-fh,0,0,0,0.3]
A wooden sword piercing a round shield from behind.
A round shield being pierced by a wooden sword from the front.
